Uses of Annotation Interface
org.eclipse.collections.api.annotation.category.Category

Packages that use Category
Package
Description
org.eclipse.collections.api.annotation.category
This package contains category annotations for classifying methods in the Eclipse Collections API.

  • Uses of Category in org.eclipse.collections.api.annotation.category

    Classes in org.eclipse.collections.api.annotation.category with annotations of type Category
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    @interface 
    Aggregating
    Marks a method as belonging to the Aggregating category.
    @interface 
    Converting
    Marks a method as belonging to the Converting category.
    @interface 
    Counting
    Marks a method as belonging to the Counting category.
    @interface 
    Filtering
    Marks a method as belonging to the Filtering category.
    @interface 
    Finding
    Marks a method as belonging to the Finding category.
    @interface 
    Grouping
    Marks a method as belonging to the Grouping category.
    @interface 
    Iterating
    Marks a method as belonging to the Iterating category.
    @interface 
    Mutating
    Marks a method as belonging to the Mutating category.
    @interface 
    Testing
    Marks a method as belonging to the Testing category.
    @interface 
    Transforming
    Marks a method as belonging to the Transforming category.
